summary: Backend testing completed for Student Import APIs. All 12 tests passed. The following endpoints were tested successfully: POST /api/import/students (Arabic columns), POST /api/students/import/{course_id} (import + auto-enroll), GET /api/students, POST /api/enrollments/{course_id}.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/import/students correctly supports Arabic column names: 'رقم الطالب' and 'اسم الطالب' mapped to student_id/full_name
POST /api/students/import/{course_id} correctly imports students and auto-enrolls them in the specified course
POST /api/enrollments/{course_id} correctly enrolls students using ObjectId or student_id number
Proper error handling: Returns 400 when department_id is missing or when required columns are not found
Import returns imported_ids which can be used for subsequent enrollment operations
seed_data_creation: Test students with prefix TEST_ and COURSE_ were created and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student import APIs are fully functional. Tests in /app/backend/tests/test_student_import.py cover: 1) Import with Arabic Excel columns, 2) Import with auto-enrollment to course, 3) Enrollment API, 4) Error cases (missing dept, wrong columns). Test IDs used: Department=698e500997fef774e66e93a8, Course=698e54c5b17b90bf5c4205fe.

tested_endpoints.POST /api/import/students: Accepts Excel with 'رقم الطالب' and 'اسم الطالب' columns, requires department_id and level query params
tested_endpoints.POST /api/students/import/{course_id}: Imports students from Excel and auto-enrolls in course, expects student_id/full_name columns
tested_endpoints.POST /api/enrollments/{course_id}: Enrolls existing students in a course using student ObjectIds
tested_endpoints.GET /api/enrollments/{course_id}: Returns list of enrolled students with enrollment details
tested_endpoints.GET /api/students: Returns all students, can verify imported students appear

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No bugs found. All import APIs working correctly.
